description: Honeypot hit on :2222 from an IP with no reputation signals (9.9.9.9). The scenario seeds the honeypot incident directly because a real TCP listener would require root on the CI runner. Stub AI returns Monitor (unknown IP, honeypot lets them in, do not auto-block) and the Monitor skill auto-executes a packet capture. Target envelope per spec 024: 1 incident, ≤1 telegram, 0 blocks, exactly 1 auto-executed decision (the Monitor capture). Envelope updated in v0.12.4 when ai.min_severity default dropped from 'high' to 'medium'; previously the Medium incident never reached AI, so auto_executed was 0.
